opensky.title: OpenSky Aerial Imagery
opensky.subtitle: Community-powered satellite alternative
opensky.be_first: Be the first to contribute aerial imagery!
opensky.no_your_missions: You haven't uploaded any missions yet
opensky.upload_cta: Upload drone photos to create your first mission!
opensky.select_multiple: Select all photos from the mission folder
opensky.upload_info_hex: Upload photos from all your flights for this tile together. Must include the 1_2D nadir flight — oblique-only uploads are rejected. GPS EXIF required. One tile per mission.
opensky.upload_info_append: Upload oblique photos from the same tile. Photos must be within the same area as the original mission.
opensky.license_consent_label: I am the author of these photos (or hold the rights) and I publish them under the CC BY-SA 4.0 license.
opensky.too_many_photos_warning: Over 600 photos — are you uploading multiple tiles? Upload one tile per mission for best results.
opensky.empty_file_error: file is empty (0 bytes). If dragging from a network mount (NFS/SMB), phone, or cloud storage, copy to a local folder first — or use the "Select Files" button.
opensky.delete_confirm_text: This will permanently delete the mission and all associated tiles. This action cannot be undone.
opensky.viewer_controls: Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom, right-click to pan
opensky.satellite_align_tooltip: Check and correct GPS offset using satellite imagery
